---
title: "Mostly Monte Carlo Seminar Series"
---

A monthly seminar (mostly) on the theory and practice of Monte Carlo in statistics and data science.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Held on the **2nd Friday of each month** (approximately) at the **PariSanté Campus**.

Organised by Timothy Johnston and Cameron Bell

Organisers emeritus: Andrea Bertazzi, [Joshua Bon](https://bonstats.github.io), and [Antoine Luciano](https://sites.google.com/view/aluciano).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout-tip

## Next Seminar: 10th April

[Salle 06](psc_rooms.qmd), 3PM Friday

-  **Pierre Monmarché** *Université Gustave Eiffel*
-  **Shiva Darshan** *ESSEC Business School*

[More details...](sem/2026/s2026_04.qmd)
:::

::: callout-warning

## Last Seminar: 13th March

[Salle 03](psc_rooms.qmd), 3PM Friday

-  **Pierre Del Moral** *INRIA Bordeaux*
-  **Bob Carpenter** *Flatiron Institute*

[More details...](sem/2026/s2026_03.qmd)
:::
